actionUnits.condition: Physics trigger enter: Move any non-player object with a Rigidbody through BoxCollider id 606197088 (isTrigger: true) on platform2 (2) to invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter on MonoBehaviour id 606197086 (script guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77, player property fileID: 7425022). Note: due to code condition if (gameObject == player), parenting will not occur, but the trigger event should still fire.
